free_text: Measurement of the energy dependence of ETA for 233U
incident neutrons beam . 70 mm diameter, 70 mm height.
Transmissions were measured by boron counter SNM-5 or
Neutrons were registered in near 2PI geometry.
Corrections on resolution, energy dependence of
efficiency of neutrons beam detector and multiple
scattering of neutrons into sample were taken into
Multiple scattering - 2.5% at 0.025 eV, 3.5% at 1 eV.
Energy resolution - about 2% at 0.2 eV relative to
ERR-ANALYS was moved in Subents 002, 005-007 according
to a comment of N.Otsuka (NDS, IAEA).
C-S values (recommended by authors) were defined by
averaging of measured c-s. NU=const was assumed.
Values for 1 -3 eV energy range are from measurement
M.M. Data were deleted as duplication of
Subent 40426006 ( two points were absent, reverse
M.M. Duplicative line in DATA block was
